title: Love and a movie under the stars
description: GEORGE NEWS - Couples and movie lovers are...
bodyText: [{"type":"intro_bold","text":"The event starts at 19:30 for a 20:00 screening."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"GEORGE NEWS - Couples and movie lovers are invited to enjoy a romantic Movie Under the Stars evening at the Fairy Knowe Hotel on Saturday 14 February.","html":"GEORGE NEWS - Couples and movie lovers are invited to enjoy a romantic Movie Under the Stars evening at the Fairy Knowe Hotel on Saturday 14 February."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The outdoor screening will feature the much-loved romantic comedy Notting Hill starring Julia Roberts and Hugh Grant."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Guests are asked to bring their own camping chairs and picnic baskets to enjoy the evening under the night sky. The event starts at 19:30 for a 20:00 screening.","html":"Guests are asked to bring their own camping chairs and picnic baskets to enjoy the evening under the night sky. The event starts at 19:30 for a 20:00 screening."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While the hotel restaurant will be closed, a cash bar will be available. All proceeds raised will go towards the Seven Passes Initiative.","html":"While the hotel restaurant will be closed, a cash bar will be available. All proceeds raised will go towards the Seven Passes Initiative."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Tickets are available on Quicket at R150 each.","html":"Tickets are available on Quicket at R150 each."}]

images.alt: Love and a movie under the stars

teaser: The event starts at 19:30 for a 20:00 screening.
featuredCaption: Enjoy a lovely night with Hugh Grant and Julia Roberts under the stars at Fairy Knowe Hotel this Valentine’s Day. Image: Canva
